subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O God of the Throne and earth, Lord of humanity and Sovereign of the hereafter and this world! I beseech Thee by the Ark [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا اله العرش و الثری و مالک الوری و سلطان الاخره و الاولی اسئلک بالسفینه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
